qa_pairs.question: How do you set your global user name and email address for Git, and what privacy consideration should you be aware of?
qa_pairs.answer: You can set your global user name using `git config --global user.name "First-name Last-name"` and your global email address using `git config --global user.email "email@address.ca"`. It's important to note that this information will become public if you push your revisions to a public repository.

qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended global setting for Git's `pack.threads`, and why is this setting important for Git commands like `git clone`?
qa_pairs.answer: It is recommended to limit yourself to only four threads for Git's `pack.threads`. You can set this globally using the command `git config --global pack.threads 4`. This setting is important because `git clone` commands may fail if they are using too many threads.
